name: Paradise Peach Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, cover pecans with water and soak for 8 to 12 hours.
2. Drain and rinse the pecans, then set aside.
3. Peel the peaches and halve them, reserving the skin. Remove the pit and thinly slice the flesh. Set aside.
4. In a food processor, blend peach skin with pecans, chopped dried pineapple, chopped fresh pineapple, apple pie spice, cinnamon, and dates.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie crust.
6. Arrange half of the peach slices in a fanned spiral on top of the filling.
7. Evenly spread half of the pineapple mixture over the peaches.
8. Repeat steps 6 and 7 with the remaining ingredients.
9. Garnish with fresh berries of your choice.
10. Serve immediately or refrigerate and serve chilled.
